meta_title: For Freelancers: freelance pitching to Solve no marketing skills (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to freelance pitching and overcome no marketing skills. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelance Pitching: How to Solve 'No Marketing Skills' Fast
content.seo_description: Stop worrying about marketing. Learn how to master freelance pitching using AI tools like Antigravity and Claude Code to scale your dev business today.
content.answer_block: You don't need a marketing degree to win clients; you need a high-leverage pitching system. By automating your outreach with Antigravity and Claude Code, you can generate personalized, high-conversion proposals in seconds, effectively replacing traditional 'marketing' with a scalable, data-driven sales engine that proves your technical value to every prospect.
content.intro:
The blank page is the freelancer's greatest enemy. You’ve spent years mastering the stack, building robust APIs, and shipping clean code, but now you’re staring at an empty inbox, paralyzed by the 'no marketing skills' narrative. It’s not that you can’t sell; it’s that you’re treating sales like a chore instead of an engineering problem.

It is time to stop cold-calling and start building a pipeline. By leveraging AI-first tooling, we can transform your technical expertise into an irresistible value proposition. This isn't about fluff—it's about building a repeatable system that bridges the gap between your terminal and a signed contract.

steps.title: Analyze Prospect Pain Points
steps.description: Use AI to scrape a prospect's public footprint and identify technical debt or performance bottlenecks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the provided URL and identify 3 specific technical pain points that a SaaS company would pay to resolve. Output as a JSON list for a pitch strategy.

steps.title: Generate Personalized Value Hooks
steps.description: Create a high-impact hook that immediately addresses the prospect's pain point without sounding like a generic template.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write 5 opening sentences for a freelance pitch. Focus on the pain points identified in step 1. Keep them under 30 words and highly professional.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Generate 5 professional email hooks based on these pain points: [paste_pain_points]'

steps.title: Build a Technical Proof-of-Concept
steps.description: Create a small, high-value artifact that proves you understand the solution to their problem.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a boilerplate script that solves the identified technical bottleneck. Keep it concise and production-ready.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Create a Python script to optimize the identified bottleneck: [paste_bottleneck_details]'

steps.title: Draft the 'Low-Friction' Proposal
steps.description: Structure your pitch as a low-risk engagement that leads with value rather than a hard sell.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Compose a 150-word freelance pitch email. Use the hook from step 2 and the proof-of-concept from step 3. Focus on 'How I can help' vs 'Who I am'.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Draft a 150-word email pitch using the provided technical proof'

steps.title: Automate Outreach Workflow
steps.description: Use your CLI tools to manage and track your outreach cycles for maximum efficiency.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a simple tracking format for these pitches, including columns for 'Prospect', 'Hook Used', and 'Follow-up Date'.

pro_tips: Always lead your pitch with a specific technical observation found in their codebase or UI, not your resume.
Use Claude Code to simulate the client's objection to your pitch so you can refine your response before hitting send.
Never send a 'general' proposal; if the prospect can't tell you read their website, you've already lost.
Keep your pitch under 200 words—busy founders value brevity over detailed background stories.
Follow up exactly 48 hours later with an additional 'quick win' or resource that provides further value.
content.next_steps: Now that you have your system, run your first 5 pitches today. Track your open rates, iterate on the hooks using Claude Code's feedback, and aim for one discovery call per week.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting 'no marketing skills' stand between you and your next high-ticket contract. Build the system, automate the outreach, and start shipping for clients who value your craft. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
